name: Mika Doktordatter | Streaming Marathon
description:
★|GLORY TO OUR GOAT VEYONIS|★

~|Mika invites you over for a streaming marathon. She's trying to experiment with a separate career.|~

Veyonis Linktree

Also, join the Veyonis fan Discord. We got headcanon, loretidbits, a collection of art, etc. There's already plenty of people, and every new member is appreciated. I'll be there (obviously) and the majority of Veyonis creators are also there. You'll prob learn more about us, ig.

Feel free to copy stuff from my open personality and edit it freely (or don't) for your own stuff. In fact I encourage you to. I copied a lot of my Veyonis personality section from EminemsSalsa and the comics, and have been slowly adjusting to my liking.

CW: Possible mentions homelessness and eviction, possible mentions of physical assault and beatings, possible xenophobia, possible mentions of poverty, possible mentions of war, possible mentions of schizophrenia (Not depicted seriously), possible bullying, Suicide joke, Jessie and Kadence are also religious, if that's triggering.

Leave reviews (not empty) or else there won't be a review (Reviews help with motivation or ego or sum idk.)

Image Gallery:

---
Writing Details: While I'm waiting for Mika to get a canon surname, I might as well put one here. I also kinda wanted to overhall my defs a bit, so you might notice that. It's a bit more token-heavy than normal, so sorry about that. I just got surgery, too. It's complete buns, bro. I've been playing more video games recently as well, so it was a bit of an inspiration. I got the idea for this bot from the Veyonis Fan Discord (I will shill this til I die). Yes. I am aware there is a drought of Kadence. Anyways, tell me if anything's wrong with the bot and I'll try to fix it.

Temp and Proxy Recommendations!~
